answer:
The lease agreement for 673 first avenue specifies that additional rent begins in lease years 11 and 25. Since the initial lease term is 49 years, the additional rent applies to the portion of the original term after year 10, which is 39 out of 49 years.  

\[
\frac{39}{49} \approx 0.7959 \quad \text{or} \quad 79.59\%
\]

\boxed{79.59\%}
